fn_declaraion.fn_code:
elf_vax_check_relocs (bfd *, struct bfd_link_info *,
					 asection *, const Elf_Internal_Rela *)

elf_vax_relocate_section (bfd *, struct bfd_link_info *,
					     bfd *, asection *, bfd_byte *,
					     Elf_Internal_Rela *,
					     Elf_Internal_Sym *, asection **)

elf_vax_finish_dynamic_symbol (bfd *, struct bfd_link_info *,
						  struct elf_link_hash_entry *,
						  Elf_Internal_Sym *)

elf_vax_gc_mark_hook (asection *sec,
		      struct bfd_link_info *info,
		      Elf_Internal_Rela *rel,
		      struct elf_link_hash_entry *h,
		      Elf_Internal_Sym *sym)
